---
title: "Publications"
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: asis

library(bibtex)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(glue)

`%||%` <- function(x, y) {
  if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0) y else x
}

bib <- read.bib("references.bib")

pubs <- imap_dfr(bib, function(entry, key) {
  entry_list <- as.list(entry)

  authors <- entry_list$author
  author_text <- if (!is.null(authors)) {
    paste(
      vapply(authors, function(x) {
        given  <- paste(x$given, collapse = " ")
        family <- paste(x$family, collapse = " ")
        name   <- trimws(paste(given, family))

        if (family == "Rose") {
          paste0("**", name, "**")
        } else {
          name
        }
      }, character(1)),
      collapse = ", "
    )
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }

  tibble(
    key     = key,
    title   = entry_list$title %||% NA_character_,
    author  = author_text,
    journal = entry_list$journal %||% entry_list$publisher %||% "",
    year    = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(entry_list$year %||% NA_character_)),
    volume  = entry_list$volume %||% "",
    number  = entry_list$number %||% "",
    pages   = entry_list$pages %||% "",
    url     = entry_list$url %||% ""
  )
})

pubs <- pubs %>%
  filter(!is.na(year)) %>%
  arrange(desc(year), title)

format_pub <- function(author, year, title, journal, volume, number, pages, url) {
  vol_issue <- dplyr::case_when(
    volume != "" & number != "" ~ glue("{volume}({number})"),
    volume != "" ~ volume,
    TRUE ~ ""
  )

  journal_part <- if (journal != "") glue("*{journal}*") else ""
  vol_part     <- if (vol_issue != "") glue(", {vol_issue}") else ""
  pages_part   <- if (pages != "") glue(", {pages}") else ""

  out <- glue("{author}. {year}. {title}. {journal_part}{vol_part}{pages_part}.")

  if (url != "") {
    out <- glue("{out} [Link]({url})")
  }

  out
}

years <- pubs %>%
  distinct(year) %>%
  arrange(desc(year)) %>%
  pull(year)

for (yr in years) {
  cat(glue("\n### {yr}\n\n"))

  pubs_year <- pubs %>% filter(year == yr)

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(pubs_year))) {
    cat(format_pub(
      author  = pubs_year$author[i],
      year    = pubs_year$year[i],
      title   = pubs_year$title[i],
      journal = pubs_year$journal[i],
      volume  = pubs_year$volume[i],
      number  = pubs_year$number[i],
      pages   = pubs_year$pages[i],
      url     = pubs_year$url[i]
    ))
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}
```
